name: Eggless Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Mrs. Dash Garlic & Herb Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mash the tofu with a fork.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well until all components are evenly incorporated.
3. Adjust seasonings to taste by adding more salt, pepper, or Mrs. Dash Garlic & Herb Seasoning as needed.
